title: Xtra Silky Indian Beetroot Curry
description: A sweet and silky Indian dish featuring cooked beetroot, this curry is perfect for meal prep and is halal-friendly. It has a smoky flavor from the cold smoke process.
instructions: Heat oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and ginger and cook for 1 minute.
Add the curry powder and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the beetroot and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add the coconut milk, tomato puree, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 20 minutes, or until the beetroot is tender.
Use an immersion blender to puree the curry to a silky smooth consistency.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Serve hot over rice or with naan bread.
